package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for env_or_config_lookup_per_request: Environment variable reads observed on request paths instead of cached configuration.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule311NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule311NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule311NegativeRecord) (Rule311NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario311Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule311NegativeService, input Rule311NegativeRecord) (Rule311NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule311NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
